tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits, including glucose metabolism (HbA1c, fasting glucose), renal function (urea, creatinine), electrolytes, and calcium. No laboratory abnormalities detected; results indicate stable metabolic and renal status. Continued routine monitoring is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Punkt Lekarski w Cieksynie
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
